data.author: marcoag
data.message:
Fix nodiscard errors by explicitly discarding. (#26)

* Fix nodiscard errors by explicitly discarding.

Signed-off-by: Marco A. Gutierrez <marcogg@marcogg.com>

* Use std::ignore to ignore returned value

---------

Signed-off-by: Marco A. Gutierrez <marcogg@marcogg.com>
